name: Grilled Chicken Dijonnais
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breasts, halves skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine oil, lemon juice, and ground pepper.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the mixture and swirl to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to marinate.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine vinegar and white wine.
5. Reduce over medium-high heat until reduced by about 2 tablespoons.
6. Remove from heat and stir in dried tarragon, white pepper, and butter tablespoon at a time, whisking thoroughly after each addition.
7. Continue cooking on low heat until the sauce thickens slightly.
8. Stir in mustard.
9. Preheat charcoal grill to medium-high.
10. Drain chicken well and grill for 3-4 minutes per side.
11. Transfer to a heated platter.
12. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley.
13. Serve warm sauce separately.
